Table of Contents

Class Patente

Namespace
Domain.Composite
Assembly
Domain.dll

Leaf node in the permission tree representing a single, atomic permission.

public class Patente : Acceso
Inheritance
object
Acceso
Patente
Inherited Members
Acceso.ToString()
Acceso.Id
Acceso.Nombre
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Patente instances cannot have children; calling Agregar(Acceso) or Eliminar(Acceso) throws InvalidOperationException. Permission checks compare TipoAcceso against PermisoKeys constants via Service.Helpers.PermisoHelper.TienePermiso.

Constructors

Patente() 

public Patente()

Properties

Accesos

Always returns an empty list; leaf nodes have no children.

public override List<Acceso> Accesos { get; }

Property Value

List<Acceso>

DataKey

Auxiliary data key used for UI display or additional filtering. Typically equals TipoAcceso.

public string DataKey { get; set; }

Property Value

string

TipoAcceso

Permission key matched against PermisoKeys constants during authorization checks.

public string TipoAcceso { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Methods

Agregar(Acceso)

Adds componente as a direct child of this node.

public override void Agregar(Acceso componente)

Parameters

componente Acceso

The component to add.

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown by leaf nodes (Patente) that do not support children.

InvalidOperationException

Always thrown — leaf nodes do not support children.

Eliminar(Acceso)

Removes componente from the direct children of this node.

public override void Eliminar(Acceso acceso)

Parameters

acceso Acceso

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown by leaf nodes (Patente) that do not support children.

InvalidOperationException

Always thrown — leaf nodes do not support children.
